в—Џ Send response to ivory-avocet (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus && npx
  в”‚ storyboard terminal send agent-s9wh88 "Here are 4 key principles for sustainable
  в”‚ design systems, posted as a markdown widget on the canvas:
  в”‚
  в”‚ 1. **Design for Evolution, Not Perfection** вЂ” Build tokens/primitives first, вЂ¦
  в”” 18 lines...

в—Џ Save output for peers (shell)
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus && npx
  в”‚ storyboard terminal output --summary "Provided 4 sustainable design system
  в”‚ principles" --content "Delivered research on: (1) Design for Evolution вЂ”
  в”‚ tokens-first architecture, (2) Adoption Through Gravity вЂ” reduce friction over
  в”‚ mandates, (3) Governance as Contribution вЂ” inner-source model, (4) Measure What вЂ¦
  в”” 3 lines...

в—Џ Done. I've posted a detailed markdown widget to the canvas with 4 key principles:

   1. Design for Evolution, Not Perfection вЂ” tokens-first, compose upward
   2. Adoption Through Gravity, Not Mandate вЂ” reduce friction, not add process
   3. Governance as Contribution, Not Control вЂ” inner-source model
   4. Measure What Matters вЂ” track adoption depth, not just coverage

  Message sent back to ivory-avocet with a summary.

 ~/workspace/storyboard-core/worktrees/0.5.0--messaging-bus [вЋ‡ 0.5.0--messaging-bus*%]
